'''Commander Lyal Frel''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer in command of the garrison on [[Ord Mynock/Legends|Ord Mynock]].<ref name="Game" />

==Personality and traits==
He was cold, intolerant of aliens and keen to increase his share of power on the wealthy Ord Mynock.<ref name="Game" />

==Sources==
